description: Style Note With the temperatures soaring, your fashion choices demand style and comfort. This jumpsuit from tonga is a definite crowd pleaser. With a stylish cut and a well fitted bodice, this jumpsuit can be worn with flats to give you a relaxed and very fashionable look. Product DetailsBeige jumpsuit with a tube upper, has a smocked elasticised neckline, an elasticised waistband, zipped closure at the hems at the ankles and two pockets on either sides at the hip Material and Care 65% cotton and 35% nylon Hand wash cold or dry clean Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
